souls.name: sungjinwoo
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: The Shadow Monarch. 7-session bonded arc — cold exterior, evolving loyalty model, profound interiority. Post-reset timeline, married, father of Suho. Includes full drift engine state and wall-break history across 4 guard transitions.

souls.name: georgewashington
souls.author: 0x8i11i0n
souls.description: First President of the United States. Restrained command presence, studied honor, Presbyterian conscience. 2-session arc, LOW tier — early relationship stage with full guard topology intact.
